faqs.question: How quickly can you treat drain flies in my Marine Park property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Marine Park locations. Our technicians can typically complete drain fly treatment within 1-2 hours, depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment includes inspection of all drains, identification of breeding sites, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain treatment, mechanical cleaning when needed, application of targeted insecticides, and follow-up recommendations. faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my Marine Park home?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that accumulates in sink drains, shower drains, and floor drains. Marine Park's older homes and buildings often have plumbing with buildup that creates perfect breeding conditions. High humidity, infrequent drain cleaning, and standing water all contribute to drain fly problems common in this Brooklyn neighborhood.

faqs.question: Will the drain fly treatment be safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved, eco-friendly products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians focus on targeted treatments within drains rather than broad spraying, minimizing any exposure. You can typically resume normal activities immediately after treatment, though we recommend keeping pets away from treated drains for 2-3 hours.
